archive_purpose: Ael-supplied Hegemony Lowlands terrain/tile visual reference

license_policy.policy: Project-provided reference; ownership and original terms require confirmation
license_policy.note: Ael supplied this project reference; it is archived for Warpkeep art direction and is not a runtime texture or geometry source. No future license is assigned by assumption.

visual_summary.subject: Seven pointy hex terrain pieces in a center-plus-six flower arrangement
visual_summary.terrain: Muted olive/moss grass with warm tan soil, sparse gray stones, and dried-gold grass tufts
visual_summary.runtime_rule: Use only broad art-direction cues; do not load, crop, trace, or depend on this image.
